name: Basta - Pizza i Vino
description: Coal-fired brick-oven pizzeria (claims the only such oven in Poland) using mostly authentic Italian products with Polish vegetables. 35 cm thin-crust pizzas, Czech beers, natural wines from small Italian vineyards.

sections.name: Pizze — numbered specials
sections.notes: Diameter 35 cm. Base shown first, then toppings.

items.name: Margherita + kiełbasa włoska (Italian sausage), grilled pepper
Focaccia + mozzarella fior di latte, mushrooms, garlic

sections.name: Bazy — build-your-own bases
sections.notes: Customize by adding toppings from three groups.

items.name: Wiosenna
items.description: mixed greens, tomato, cucumber, feta, pesto dressing, breadsticks

items.name: Rokola
items.description: mixed greens, onion, sundried tomato, black olives, grana padano DOP, balsamic dressing, breadsticks

items.name: Prosciutto & Mozzarella
items.description: mozzarella fior di latte, prosciutto crudo, basil, olive oil, balsamico

items.name: Caprese
items.description: mozzarella fior di latte, tomatoes, basil, olive oil, balsamico

items.name: NY cheesecake
items.description: New York–style cheesecake on shortcrust base, fresh fruit, caramelized sugar top

items.name: Natural Italian wines
items.description: Tuscany reds, Friuli whites & orange wines, light frizzante
